Video.summary: Sam adds some Lokar Performance flair to the '66 Mustang.
Video.title: Lokar Hooks Up the '66

Video.title: Bandit Stopping Power

Video.summary: Join master mechanic Sam Mahdavi for new projects, repairs and the best parts on the market.
Video.title: New Generation Techs

Video.summary: Sam is at the NHOU headquarters to learn about their new products.
Video.title: What's New at NHOU?

Video.summary: Sam installs a Holley Sniper EFI & MSD on Vic's '66 Mustang.
Video.title: All Fueled Up

Video.summary: Sam Mahdavi shares the expertise he's gained from years in the shop.
Video.title: Season Finale With the Bandit

Video.summary: Sam installs a Holley Sniper EFI fuel system in the OBS Chevy project.
Video.title: Sniper EFI for the OBS
